about.title: About me
about.intro: I'm Diego Barreiro, a software developer specialized in multiplatform applications.
about.p1: With over 8 years of experience in various sectors, in 2022 I was presented with a unique opportunity to boost my professional career. I decided to leave a stable job, where I had worked for years, to train in software development. It was a thoughtful and strategic decision, motivated by the desire to feel fulfilled and unleash my creativity in a field I am passionate about: creating innovative solutions from scratch and contributing to the continuous improvement of efficiency, both for companies and individuals on their way to the future.
about.p2: My formal entry into the world of development began that same year, starting my training and culminating with an internship at ATOS IT Solutions & Services, a process in which I acquired a solid foundation and valuable experience. Since then, I have been expanding my knowledge self-taught while developing personal projects, which keeps me in constant learning. Throughout my training and experience, I have consolidated skills in Java, Kotlin, Spring, Jetpack Compose, and SQL, among others, and I strive every day to be a professional in constant evolution.
about.p3: I am inspired by how industry leaders convey trust and autonomy. Although I am currently at an early stage, I aspire to work with the same approach, freedom, and responsibility as an experienced professional: steadily, without distractions, and always on the rise, in an environment that allows me to grow and learn, both self-taught and as a team.
about.p4: When working in a team, I deeply value trust and direct communication within the development group. As long as my true value is recognized, I am committed to always giving my one hundred percent; otherwise, if I do not provide tangible value, I will choose to explore new horizons.
about.p5: My philosophy is to move forward constantly, combining creativity, commitment, and curiosity, with quality as the central pillar in every project.
